verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each required evidence_feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.
cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All features are traceable from part_tree to geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name.

verify.value: Interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Reciprocal interface rule: name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature so the neighbor can declare the same joint family back.

verify.value: Visible locking elements are present at critical joints.
verify.rule: Joint evidence rule: critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.

risk.desc: Potential structural weakness at the slide rail interface due to insufficient support.
risk.mit: Increase the thickness of the slide rail and ensure proper support during manufacturing.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress if cooling channels are not properly designed.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis to optimize cooling channel design and insulation thickness.

risk.desc: Inadequate accessibility for maintenance if cutaway windows are too small.
risk.mit: Increase the size of the cutaway windows to ensure unobstructed view and ease of access.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment if mounting datums are not clearly defined.
risk.mit: Ensure clear definition and visibility of all mounting datums and alignment keys.

risk.desc: Potential strain on cables if harness routing does not follow minimum bend radius guidelines.
risk.mit: Implement strain relief geometry and ensure all cable exits follow minimum bend radius guidelines.
